content.text:
Now I have a very clear view of atom **N:7** and all its covalent bonds. From the zoomed and rotated views, I can clearly identify the following connections:

---

## Results for Atom N:7

**Neighbour atoms of N:7 (Nitrogen):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|:---:|:---:|
| **6** | C (Carbon) |
| **8** | C (Carbon) |
| **43** | C (Carbon) |

**N:7** is covalently bonded to **three** atoms:
1. **C:6** — part of the purine ring (upper right)
2. **C:8** — part of the five-membered imidazole ring (lower right)
3. **C:43** — an exocyclic carbon substituent (left side)

---

**geomconf_index: 5513**

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
